creator: kickchristoph@googlemail.com
text:
On 09/22/2010 02:33 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/rubygem-rubygame,
>
> Please note that PR ports/150815 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/150815
>
>    
i approve it, thank you!
